Name: Tempus
Description: Tempus uses AI and genomic data to personalize cancer treatment. Partners with health systems and pharma companies for precision medicine.

Name: Ro
Description: Ro is a patient-centric healthcare technology company offering telehealth prescriptions and home delivery of medications.

Name: Olive AI
Description: Olive builds AI workforce solutions for healthcare automating repetitive tasks across revenue cycle claims and prior auth.

Name: Sword Health
Description: Sword Health provides AI-powered digital physical therapy and musculoskeletal care programs for employers and health plans.

Name: Hinge Health
Description: Hinge Health offers digital musculoskeletal care combining wearable sensors with health coaching and exercise therapy.

Name: Viz.ai
Description: Viz.ai uses AI to analyze medical imaging and alert care teams about suspected strokes and other conditions in real-time.

Name: Cerebral
Description: Cerebral is an online mental health company providing therapy and medication management via telehealth platform.

Name: Abridge
Description: Abridge uses AI to automatically summarize medical conversations between doctors and patients reducing documentation burden.

Name: Nuvance Health
Description: Nuvance Health is a nonprofit health system operating hospitals and outpatient locations across New York and Connecticut.

Name: Komodo Health
Description: Komodo Health maps the healthcare system using data analytics to provide insights on patient journeys and treatment patterns.
